name: Emerald Elytra
descs:
First Turn Start of a wave: 1 fastest ally gains 3 [Breath] Potency and 2 [Breath] Count.

If the ally has Envy Affinity Attack Skills, gain 4 [Breath] Potency and 3 [Breath] Count instead.

First Turn Start of a wave: 1 fastest ally gains 4 [Breath] Potency and 4 [Breath] Count.

If the ally has Envy Affinity Attack Skills, gain 5 [Breath] Potency and 5 [Breath] Count instead.

Turn Start: 1 fastest ally gains 4 [Breath] Potency and 4 [Breath] Count.

If the ally has Envy Affinity Attack Skills, gain 5 [Breath] Potency and 5 [Breath] Count instead.
